exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p = td / "intake.txt"
p.write_text("cliente;José Quispe\n", encoding="utf-8")
text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
print(text.strip())
print("exists", p.exists(), "size", p.stat().st_size)
exercises.justification_from_packet: encoding='utf-8' evita depender del locale del SO al leer/escribir texto. Path write/read con encoding utf-8 explícito.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import os, tempfile

def write_atomic(path: Path, text: str) -> None:
    path = Path(path)
    tmp = path.with_name(path.name + ".tmp")
    tmp.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(tmp, path)

td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
dest = td / "clean.csv"
write_atomic(dest, "id,nombre\nC001,Ana\n")
print(dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print("tmp gone", not (td / "clean.csv.tmp").exists())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Escritura atómica: temp + os.replace al destino para no dejar half-writes. temp + os.replace = escritura atómica.

exercises.code:
# no open(dest,'w') directo en pipelines críticos si hay crash mid-write
print("prefer write_atomic over direct truncate")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Escritura atómica: temp + os.replace al destino para no dejar half-writes. Preferir atómico frente a truncate directo.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import os, tempfile
def write_atomic(path, text):
    path = Path(path)
    tmp = path.with_name(path.name + ".tmp")
    tmp.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(tmp, path)
td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
write_atomic(td/"out.txt", "ok")
print((td/"out.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Escritura atómica: temp + os.replace al destino para no dejar half-writes. Demo atómica mínima.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
from decimal import Decimal
raw = "id,nombre,monto,fecha\nC001,Ana,10.5,2026-01-10\nC002,Luis,20,2026-01-11\n"
rows = []
for row in csv.DictReader(io.StringIO(raw)):
    row["monto"] = Decimal(row["monto"]).quantize(Decimal("0.01"))
    rows.append(row)
for r in rows:
    print(r["id"], r["monto"], type(r["monto"]).__name__, r["fecha"])
exercises.justification_from_packet: DictReader + Decimal para monto; fecha ISO string. Esto sale del paquete activo de la sección y del iDo/teoría del curso, sin ejecución local.
Filas con shape roto van a cuarentena con motivo, no silencio. Filas incompletas a cuarentena.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
# columnas de más
raw = "id,nombre\nC001,Ana,extra\n"
# DictReader may put extras under None key depending on restval
print("policy: quarantine rows with wrong width")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Filas con shape roto van a cuarentena con motivo, no silencio. Width incorrecto → cuarentena con motivo.

exercises.code:
clean, quar = [], []
for row in [{"id":"C1","ok":True},{"id":"C2","ok":False}]:
    (clean if row["ok"] else quar).append(row)
print("n_clean", len(clean), "n_quar", len(quar))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Filas con shape roto van a cuarentena con motivo, no silencio. Split clean vs quarantine.
Filas con shape roto van a cuarentena con motivo, no silencio. Motivo de cuarentena explícito.

print(hashlib.sha256(body).hexdigest()[:12])
